blocks.content: The Ice Queen slowly raised her hand and spoke.

blocks.speaker: The Ice Queen
blocks.content: Weak humans, kneel before me.
The tourists applauded and enjoyed the Ice Queen's serious tone.

blocks.speaker: Tourist
blocks.content: Nice voice! Sounds convincing!

blocks.speaker: Tourist
blocks.content: Hey, Queen! Look over here. How about shaking hands with the Ice Queen... Ugh!
The man suddenly grabbed his neck and knelt down.
The same thing happened to people simultaneously.
Their faces turned red as if they were about to burst.
They desperately tried to breathe, but their breathing became increasingly rough.
Only Shirone's party was standing normally.
Shirone observed the changes in people.
A necklace with conical spikes was now around their necks.

blocks.speaker: Liria
blocks.content: Is that a Dharma Wheel...?
The Dharma Wheel is an exorcism tool of the Exorcism Council that embodies the principles of law in its form, and its effectiveness is maximized the closer it is to a perfect circle.
The Dharma Wheels available to the public were mere imitations, at best promoting mental stability.
However, the official Dharma Wheels possessed by exorcists could only be manufactured by a craftsman who had reached the state of Nirvana.
To Liria, the Dharma Wheels around people's necks seemed genuine.
Although the perfection of the circle couldn't be distinguished by the eye, seasoned exorcists could sense the nature of the circle with their inner eye.

blocks.speaker: Liria
blocks.content: A Dharma Wheel of Restraint. This is not from this world. Be careful. If you get caught in the wave of law, you'll end up like that.
As the people affected by the wave of law lost strength in their legs and knelt, the Dharma Wheels loosened, and air finally entered their throats.
Rough breathing was heard from all around.

blocks.speaker: Person
blocks.content: Ugh! Ugh! What is this? Who put this necklace on me?

blocks.speaker: Person
blocks.content: Hey! Someone please take this off!
Jocre watched the terrified people with a shiver running down his spine.
The form of the Dharma Wheel was implemented from the Ice Queen's unique memory, but the way it choked people's necks was his strategy.
The Ice Queen can change the rules of the world.
He wasn't sure if it was possible to this extent, but seeing everyone kneeling confirmed it.
The legend of the Ice Queen, who dominated the era 800 years ago, was entirely true.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: It's done! It's really done! I can't believe this day has come for me.
At this rate, ruling the world wasn't just a dream.
Moreover, she didn't remember anything from the past, possibly due to her 800-year hibernation.
The mage who once terrified the world had become a child who could be coaxed with a piece of candy.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: The Ice Queen will be mine.
After sorting out this place, he planned to gently coax the Ice Queen to make her his woman.
It was strange to date someone over 800 years old, but she seemed likely to fall for it, and above all, she was beautiful.
Even compared to Amy, who had coldly rejected him five years ago, she was not lacking in appearance.
Lost in such delusions, the Ice Queen turned to Jocre and asked.

blocks.speaker: The Ice Queen
blocks.content: Is this how it's done?
Jocre smiled satisfactorily at the Ice Queen's attitude of relying on him, asking about even the smallest things.
But he still needed to be careful not to offend her, so he bowed his head and answered as if addressing a real queen.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: Yes. Everyone will obey you, Your Majesty.
Liria realized that most elements of the Ice Queen's personality were influenced by Jocre.

blocks.speaker: Liria
blocks.content: Is it as the prophecy said...?
As with most descent myths, this time too, the Ice Queen would meet one human and plunge the world into the abyss of evil.
Shirone looked at the grim scene of hundreds of people kneeling with a horrified expression.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is this? It doesn't seem like magic.
It was a natural question for someone who didn't know the law.
It's not equivalent exchange.
There was no way to put a choking Dharma Wheel on hundreds of people just because they didn't follow orders.
Even the irregularities of the Fairy Chief of Heaven, Igirin, weren't this bizarre.
Dante, who had no time to explain, spoke briefly.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: It's called the power of law. Be careful. That woman can change the rules of the world.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Change the rules?
The first thing Shirone thought of was the Akashic Records.
But no being could twist the rules on such a grand scale unless they were an infinite mage.
Then there was only one possibility.
It was the Akashic Records from the beginning.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Some kind of... conceptual entity?
Liria turned her head with wide eyes.
It was impossible for anyone other than a spiritual practitioner to understand the essence of a spirit dedicated to a human body.

blocks.speaker: Liria
blocks.content: This child knows the law...
Most people live without knowing that the world moves according to the rules of the whole.
It was surprising that Shirone knew the mechanism of the law, which was passed down to only a few even in the shrine.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's right. It was a spiritual entity that couldn't be ranked from the beginning. It's called a demigod phenomenon. It's impossible for you to defend against it without knowing the law. Stay close to me.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: You! What are you plotting?

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: Hahaha! Plotting? Do you still think this is a joke? We will conquer the world.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: Stop talking nonsense! Do you really want to get hit?
Jocre conveyed to the people.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: Everyone, worship the Queen. If you don't obey, the Queen's law will kill you.
As the Dharma Wheels tightened around their necks, the terrified people touched the ground with their hands and choked.
Then they shouted in squeezed voices.

blocks.speaker: Person
blocks.content: Long live the Queen!

blocks.speaker: Person
blocks.content: We will follow the Queen!
As the faces of those who worshipped the Queen returned to a calm state,
Shirone finally realized the seriousness of the situation.
Even Jocre's orders were being enforced by the law.
Unlike logically designated magic, the law was a process of readjusting the balance of the whole.
As the voices praising the Ice Queen pierced the sky,
Jocre tasted a pleasure he had never felt before.
It was as if they were all worshipping him.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: How about it? This is my power. If you come under me now, you won't end up like that.
Jocre expected Shirone's party to tremble,
but contrary to his expectations, no one moved and they were watching the situation.
Dante, with his hands in his pockets, walked out crookedly.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Hey, you. Are you out of your mind? Do you know what you're doing right now?

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: Ha! Do you think I'm crazy? Not at all! Can't you see the state of the people? You'll end up like that too.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: You almost killed hundreds of people just now.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: Do you know what it means to rule the world? Can you really take responsibility for that statement?
Jocre's face turned pale.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: Ugh...!
Becoming the ruler of the world was an ambition every man might have had at least once.
But in reality, he was just one human who didn't want to go to prison or die.
The Ice Queen can change the rules.
So if you put a leash on them, they will obey orders because they don't want to die.
That was the extent of Jocre's calculated thoughts.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: But what if they refused?
They would all become corpses with broken necks.
Of course, no one in the world wanted to die,
but once he imagined it, an unbearable fear surged in.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: Can I really conquer the world?
Maybe he was temporarily insane, as Dante said.
While he was thinking that, Vivian's voice was heard.

blocks.speaker: Vivian
blocks.content: Hmph! So what? According to our words, no one will die! Then the first victims will be you!
Jocre turned to Vivian with a blank expression.
Her eyes had completely changed overnight.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: Did you think you would always be the protagonists of the world?
We are the ones controlling this situation now!

blocks.speaker: Vivian
blocks.content: Let's buy some time. I'll do as you say.
As Amy approached,
Jocre's lips curled up.
'Of course, what could she do to resist?'
At that moment, Shirone grabbed Amy's shoulder.
When Amy turned around with a surprised expression,
Jocre's eyes flared.

blocks.speaker: Jocre
blocks.content: What are you doing? Do you want to protect your lover's pride even if everyone dies?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. Amy has no reason to follow your words.
Jocre's face twisted.
Is this what they call a mage's cold rationality?
No, it's arrogance.
Valuing a lover's pride over the lives of hundreds of people is not acceptable.
